title: 信息日报 2026-07-10

headline.title: GPT-5.6 系列发布：Luna、Terra、Sol 三款模型亮相
headline.summary: OpenAI 正式发布 GPT-5.6 系列旗舰模型，分为 Luna、Terra、Sol 三个规格，定价分别为每百万输入/输出 token 1/6、2.5/15、5/30 美元。该模型现已通过 Microsoft 365 Copilot 等渠道可用，标志着 AI 能力再次跃升。
headline.title_en: The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol
headline.summary_en: OpenAI released its new flagship GPT-5.6 models in three sizes: Luna, Terra, and Sol, with prices ranging from $1/$6 to $5/$30 per million tokens. The models are now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot, signaling another leap in AI capabilities.
headline.original_title: The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol
headline.reason: GPT-5.6 是 OpenAI 最新旗舰模型，覆盖从轻量到强力的全规格，定价具有竞争力，且立即集成到 Microsoft 365 中，对 AI 开发者和企业用户影响巨大。
headline.reason_en: GPT-5.6 is OpenAI's latest flagship family offering tiered capabilities at competitive prices, with immediate integration into Microsoft 365, making it the most impactful news for AI developers and enterprises today.
